steps.title: Add confirming evidence
steps.content: The first sentence says the ANLA is known for an impressive audio collection. The next sentence backs up that claim by giving the size and age of the collection.

steps.title: Remove wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice B does not create a logical transition. Choice C signals contrast, but the second sentence supports the first. Choice D signals replacement or opposition, which also does not fit the confirming detail. The answer is A.
